title: RottenPlayer
description: Mod that adds a PlayerState that turns Players into moribund skeletons.
body:
# About
The mod let's you slowly turn your player character into a undead looking skeleton, through eating rotten flesh or dying a few times.

# General Info
## Rot Mechanic
As explained in the previous heading, eating rotten flesh and dying will slowly decay the player's skin, showing a skeleton inside.
## New item: Rebound Stew
If you don't wish to look like a half zombie, you can eat a REBOUND STEW. It reverses the effects and turns you back to normal player.
You can get the rebound stew, by crafting it in the crafting table.
![Crafting recipe of Rebound Stew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2031d38ec5c3ff9fea0992e1ff55ca85ef1ee48.png)
## Commands
The mod's command are accessible through 
```/rottenplayermod```
### List of commands:
- ```showdata``` shows the data values of the player
- ```reset``` resets the data of the player back to default values
- ```minimumRotPointsValue``` change the minimum required amount of eaten rotten flesh for the effect to apply
- ```burnInDaylight``` makes the player burn in daylight after a specified level of the effect
- ```waterBreathing``` enables the player to breath under water after a specified level of the effect (same level as in burnInDaylight)
- ```setCurrentRotLevel``` manually set the desired level of the effect on your player character **withing range of 0.4 to 1.0**
